quotes.text: The best businesses are built on one simple insight: 'This could be so much better.' Execute that insight.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your most important feature request is the one users haven't asked for yet, but would change their life if it existed.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best indie businesses are built on one simple insight. Find yours and execute relentlessly.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your most valuable product feedback comes from the users who almost left but stayed. Find out why they stayed.
quotes.author: based
